items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of an individual cancellation within a group scenario, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this specific scenario. The prior steps focus on booking confirmations and do not include any validations or outcomes related to cancellations. Therefore, it is unclear whether the system supports this scenario or produces a failure report as expected.
